action: Search and gather 10 news articles about Tamil Nadu every hour from reliable news sources.
fallback_action: If future hourly news gathering fails, retry after a short delay, attempt different reliable sources, and notify the user of the failure reason and resolution steps.

recipe.steps: Formulate targeted queries and fetch Tamil Nadu news headlines for today's date from reliable sources: The Hindu, NDTV, Indian Express.
Parse each website page, extract only headline text from the correct news sections, ensuring irrelevant or menu content is not included.
Aggregate headlines from all sources into a collection, ensuring there are exactly 10 items for delivery.
Present the initial batch of headlines to the user and inquire about link preferences.
Schedule an hourly job to repeat headline gathering and delivery automatically.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Automatically gather and deliver 10 Tamil Nadu news headlines from reliable sources every hour.
